title: Why Use Natural Deodorant? Benefits & Reasons to Switch
meta_description: Discover why use natural deodorant and how switching from antiperspirant can benefit your health, skin, and the planet. Find your perfect match at Real Skin Care.
image_prompt: Product photography, a blank white deodorant stick, a small cluster of fresh eucalyptus sprigs, and a neat pile of fine baking soda powder, arranged on a smooth white-oak wood tabletop with visible grain, set against a blurred out-of-focus soft green foliage background, lit by warm golden morning side light from the left, captured at a slightly elevated 30-degree angle, landscape crop. No text, no labels, no logos, photorealistic, 35mm lens, shot on Canon R5, wide landscape crop filling the full frame edge to edge, no letterboxing, no borders.
